sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 25

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 25:1
items.html:
(to the question) Gevurot Nekevot [female Gevurot]
Female Gevurot [judgments] means that they pass through a Masach [screen] and lack the first three [GaR]. See Answer 24. (There)
